description: Cross-standard mapping of selected controls across ISO/IEC 27001:2022, NIST CSF 2.0, Cyber Essentials, and GDPR. Each mapping group links requirements that share a unified governance objective.

mappings.unified_objective: Ensure only authorised users can access systems and data through secure authentication and access management.
mappings.notes: GDPR Article 32 addresses access control as part of security of processing, hence complementary rather than equivalent.

mappings.unified_objective: Establish and maintain incident response capabilities, including planning, detection, reporting, and post-incident review.
mappings.notes: GDPR Article 33 focuses specifically on breach notification, which is one aspect of incident response.

mappings.unified_objective: Protect personal and sensitive data through appropriate technical and organisational measures, including encryption, access controls, and privacy-by-design principles.
mappings.notes: ISO 27001 access control supports GDPR data protection but is not solely focused on personal data.

mappings.unified_objective: Establish risk management processes including risk identification, assessment, treatment, and regular review.
mappings.notes: GDPR DPIA is a specific type of risk assessment focused on data protection impact.

mappings.unified_objective: Identify and remediate technical vulnerabilities in a timely manner through patch management and secure configuration.
mappings.notes: NIST ID.RA-01 covers vulnerability identification; CE-PM-01 focuses on patching timelines.

mappings.unified_objective: Protect network boundaries and monitor network activity to detect and prevent adverse events.
mappings.notes: ISO A8.1 focuses on endpoint devices; NIST DE.CM-01 on network monitoring; CE-FW-01 on boundary firewalls.

mappings.unified_objective: Establish, communicate, and maintain information security policies approved by management.
mappings.notes: Both ISO A5.1 and NIST GV.PO-01 address the establishment of cybersecurity policies.

mappings.unified_objective: Ensure personnel receive appropriate cybersecurity awareness training and education.
mappings.notes: Both standards require awareness and training programmes for personnel.
